mapper.sql: ORG_NO, ORG_NM, ORG_CD, ORG_DISP_NM, SAVE_CAN_YN, USE_CAN_YN, MEMBER_AUTO_REG_YN, ORG_STS_CD, JOIN_DT, LEAVE_DT, REG_USER_ID, REG_DT, LAST_MOD_USER_ID, LAST_MOD_DT
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from t_org_mst
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into t_org_mst (ORG_NO, ORG_NM, ORG_CD, ORG_DISP_NM, SAVE_CAN_YN, USE_CAN_YN, MEMBER_AUTO_REG_YN, ORG_STS_CD, JOIN_DT, LEAVE_DT, REG_USER_ID, REG_DT, LAST_MOD_USER_ID, LAST_MOD_DT) values (#{orgNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{orgNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orgCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orgDispNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{saveCanYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{useCanYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{memberAutoRegYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orgStsCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{joinDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{leaveDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into t_org_mst
ORG_NO,
ORG_NM,
ORG_CD,
ORG_DISP_NM,
SAVE_CAN_YN,
USE_CAN_YN,
MEMBER_AUTO_REG_YN,
ORG_STS_CD,
JOIN_DT,
LEAVE_DT,
REG_USER_ID,
REG_DT,
LAST_MOD_USER_ID,
LAST_MOD_DT,
#{orgNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{orgNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{orgCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{orgDispNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{saveCanYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{useCanYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{memberAutoRegYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{orgStsCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{joinDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{leaveDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update t_org_mst
ORG_NO = #{row.orgNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
ORG_NM = #{row.orgNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ORG_CD = #{row.orgCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ORG_DISP_NM = #{row.orgDispNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SAVE_CAN_YN = #{row.saveCanYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
USE_CAN_YN = #{row.useCanYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MEMBER_AUTO_REG_YN = #{row.memberAutoRegYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ORG_STS_CD = #{row.orgStsCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
JOIN_DT = #{row.joinDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
LEAVE_DT = #{row.leaveDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
REG_USER_ID = #{row.regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REG_DT = #{row.regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
LAST_MOD_USER_ID = #{row.lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LAST_MOD_DT = #{row.lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

update t_org_mst set ORG_NO = #{row.orgNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ORG_NM = #{row.orgNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORG_CD = #{row.orgCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORG_DISP_NM = #{row.orgDispNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SAVE_CAN_YN = #{row.saveCanYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USE_CAN_YN = #{row.useCanYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MEMBER_AUTO_REG_YN = #{row.memberAutoRegYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORG_STS_CD = #{row.orgStsCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, JOIN_DT = #{row.joinDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, LEAVE_DT = #{row.leaveDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, REG_USER_ID = #{row.regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REG_DT = #{row.regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, LAST_MOD_USER_ID = #{row.lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_MOD_DT = #{row.lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}

update t_org_mst
ORG_NM = #{orgNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ORG_CD = #{orgCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ORG_DISP_NM = #{orgDispNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SAVE_CAN_YN = #{saveCanYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
USE_CAN_YN = #{useCanYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MEMBER_AUTO_REG_YN = #{memberAutoRegYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ORG_STS_CD = #{orgStsCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
JOIN_DT = #{joinDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
LEAVE_DT = #{leaveDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
REG_USER_ID = #{regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REG_DT = #{regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
LAST_MOD_USER_ID = #{lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LAST_MOD_DT = #{lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where ORG_NO = #{orgNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update t_org_mst set ORG_NM = #{orgNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORG_CD = #{orgCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORG_DISP_NM = #{orgDispNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SAVE_CAN_YN = #{saveCanYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USE_CAN_YN = #{useCanYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MEMBER_AUTO_REG_YN = #{memberAutoRegYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORG_STS_CD = #{orgStsCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, JOIN_DT = #{joinDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, LEAVE_DT = #{leaveDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, REG_USER_ID = #{regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REG_DT = #{regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, LAST_MOD_USER_ID = #{lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_MOD_DT = #{lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where ORG_NO = #{orgNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}
